title: andropogon gambiensis
intro: Andropogon gambiensis, also known as Daboawo or Gambian grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Andropogon gambiensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Andropogon gambiensis can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine in Africa.
